hero.art_prompt: Ananya, a 29 year old Indian woman in smart professional attire, warm and confident, managing a modern hospital corridor with staff, caring and aspirational, clean bright setting.

panels.narration: Ananya was already good at working in healthcare at work.
panels.dialogue: I wanted to improve how care is run.
panels.img_prompt: Ananya, 29, a caring healthcare professional helping organise a busy but calm hospital ward, modern clean hospital.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I manage a hospital?
panels.img_prompt: Ananya looking thoughtful, wondering how to move into healthcare management and leadership, clipboard in hand, hospital corridor.

panels.narration: Then she found an online MBA in Healthcare Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Ananya's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Healthcare Management, warm hopeful glow, tidy home.

panels.narration: Ananya enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Ananya confidently starting her first healthcare management lesson on a laptop at home, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Healthcare Management
points: Master the real craft: hospital operations, health systems, healthcare quality and medical administration.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Ananya Nair
testimonials.quote: I wanted to improve care delivery. This MBA gave me the tools to actually lead it.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning hospital operations and quality systems made me ready to manage, not just assist.

testimonials.name: Imran Ali
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI and online classes let me study while working full shifts.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real healthcare skills got me into a hospital administration role.
